headlines.title: Trump exacts revenge in Indiana over redistricting vote, with five GOP legislators defeated
headlines.description: A majority of the seven state senators on the ballot Tuesday who faced Trump-backed challengers lost their primaries, NBC News projects.

headlines.title: 'Ohio is back': Both parties navigate competitive midterm races in a forgotten battleground
headlines.description: Two hard facts hover over this year’s midterm races in Ohio.

headlines.title: Democrats keep control of Michigan state Senate after special election win
headlines.description: Democrat Chedrick Greene has won a special state Senate election in Michigan, NBC News projects, ensuring his party will keep control of the closely divided chamber.

headlines.title: GOP Proposes $1B in Taxpayer Dollars to Secure Trump Ballroom
headlines.description: Senate Republican lawmakers are adding $1 billion in public funds to a new spending bill to support President Donald Trump’s White House Ballroom, a project that was first billed as a privately funded endeavor. The White House says “Private donations are paying for the ballroom,” but that the bill, “gives much needed security and hardening and training money” to the Secret Service. NBC’s Kelly O’Donnell reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Trump Suspends Military Escorts in Hormuz 1 Day Into Operation
headlines.description: President Donald Trump says “Project Freedom,” his newly minted military operation to escort commercial ships through the Strait of Hormuz and break an Iranian blockade, is suspended one day after it began. Trump said the pause will help diplomatic talks to end the war brokered by Pakistan. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Trump-Backed Candidates Win Big in Midwest Primaries
headlines.description: Overnight results from a number of key primary races in the Midwest are being seen as a major test of President Donald Trump’s hold on the Republican base as his party fights to keep control of Congress. In Indiana, a majority of incumbent Republican state senators who faced Trump-backed challengers lost their races. The incumbents were targeted by the president after they voted against his call to change the state's congressional map, a move that would've created two additional GOP-friendly s

headlines.title: The front-runners to lead Bernie Sanders' grassroots movement in 2028
headlines.description: The massive grassroots movement that twice rallied behind Bernie Sanders' presidential bids is facing a big question: Who will emerge as its next leader?

headlines.title: Anger and despair among Jewish Britons after spate of attacks
headlines.description: LONDON — Britain in 2026 is a place where Jack Hur doesn’t feel safe wearing his Star of David pendant.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Republicans fill out the House battlefield with challengers in key districts
headlines.description: The November battle for control of the House is coming into focus in Tuesday’s primaries, as Republicans pick nominees to challenge Democratic incumbents in Ohio and Indiana

headlines.title: Vivek Ramaswamy wins GOP nomination for governor in Ohio
headlines.description: Businessman Vivek Ramaswamy has won Ohio’s Republican primary for governor, NBC News projects, advancing to what could be an expensive and competitive general election with Democrat Amy Acton in a state that has been brutal for Democrats in recent elections.

headlines.title: FAA employee in New Hampshire charged with threatening to kill Trump
headlines.description: Dean DelleChiaie is alleged to have sent an email threatening Trump after having been reported to the Secret Service for sinister internet searches in January.
